calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Melanie D. Popper, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, DEERE EMPLOYEE'S CREDIT UNION.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MICHAEL TALTY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declaration of Sandra Overturf filed in lieu of live testimony at Prove-up hearing is admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $80,605.68
Pre-Judgment Interestat the annual rate of 6.2%: $2,730.60
Attorney's Fees: $1,390.50
Costs: $610.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $85,336.78
Judgment signed in open court.
